one_line_summary: Complete, well-documented limiter with atomic Lua, solid concurrency tests, and a perfect adversarial pass rate.
strengths: Thorough ADR with real tradeoffs and rejected alternatives
Atomic Lua scripts using Redis TIME for clock-skew safety
All 5 adversarial tests pass; concurrency tests exercise 100+ threads
weaknesses: Minor: InMemoryBackend remaining/reset_ts math has redundant branches and awkward clamping
Hypothesis property test depends on wall-clock sleeps, weakening invariant strength
Middleware limit header falls back to getattr chain rather than a clean limiter property
